name: Adepta Sororitas
description: The Adepta Sororitas, also known as the Sisters of Battle, are an all-female faction in Warhammer 40,000. They are a religious order that is devoted to the worship of the God-Emperor, and are known for their fanatical devotion to the Emperor and their ruthless persecution of heretics and Xenos. They are an extremely disciplined force that is trained in both combat and religious ceremony
creator: Camelotis
